title: Light Fluffy Irish Soda Bread Dumplings
description: Moist, pillowy, and aromatic Irish dumplings made with plain flour and a hint of whole wheat.

ingredients.name: Whole wheat flour
ingredients.notes: Whole wheat adds nutty flavor and extra nutrition

instructions: Preheat the steamer basket over boiling water.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together flours, baking powder, and salt.
Add softened butter, broken into small pieces, and use a pastry blender or fingers to work it into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse breadcrumbs.
In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, egg, and sugar.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5-7 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each into a ball.
Place the dumplings in the steamer basket, leaving about 1 inch of space between each.
Steam the dumplings for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through and fluffy.
Serve hot with your favorite soup or stew.
